title: Office of Government and External Affairs
description: LLNL's Office of Government and External Affairs (OGEA) works to help widen knowledge of and deepen support for the Laboratory's research and development efforts by carrying out institutional engagement at all levels of government, and with key external leaders.
text:
What We Do
Within Lawrence Livermore National Laboratory (LLNL), the Office of Government and External Affairs (OGEA) works to help widen knowledge of and deepen support for LLNL research and development efforts by carrying out institutional engagement at all levels of government, and with key external leaders.
Along with developing relationships with federal, state, regional and local government stakeholders, as well as nongovernment organizations, OGEA manages the Offsite Fellows and Laboratory Tour programs.
